# Support

## 📖 Documentation

Before asking for help, please check our documentation:

- **[User Guide](https://github.com/zfz584521-collab/obsidian-ai-workb/blob/main/使用说明.md)** - Complete usage tutorial
- **[Developer Guide](https://github.com/zfz584521-collab/obsidian-ai-workb/blob/main/DEVELOPMENT.md)** - Development and contribution guide
- **[FAQ](https://github.com/zfz584521-collab/obsidian-ai-workb/blob/main/使用说明.md#常见问题)** - Frequently asked questions

## 💬 Community Support

### GitHub Discussions

For general questions, feature discussions, and community support:

👉 [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/zfz584521-collab/obsidian-ai-workb/discussions)

### GitHub Issues

For bug reports and feature requests:

👉 [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/zfz584521-collab/obsidian-ai-workb/issues)

## 🐛 Bug Reports

If you found a bug, please [open an issue](https://github.com/zfz584521-collab/obsidian-ai-workb/issues/new?template=bug_report.md) with:

- Clear description of the bug
- Steps to reproduce
- Expected vs actual behavior
- Your environment details
- Console logs (if applicable)

## 💡 Feature Requests

Have an idea to improve the plugin? [Submit a feature request](https://github.com/zfz584521-collab/obsidian-ai-workb/issues/new?template=feature_request.md)!

We welcome:
- New feature suggestions
- UI/UX improvements
- Performance enhancements
- Documentation improvements

## 🔒 Security Issues

If you discover a security vulnerability, please **do not** open a public issue.

Instead, email us directly at: [your-email@example.com]

We take security seriously and will respond promptly.

## 🌟 Response Time

We aim to respond to:
- **Critical bugs**: Within 24 hours
- **Regular issues**: Within 3-5 days
- **Feature requests**: Within 1-2 weeks
- **Questions**: Within 1-3 days

## 🤝 Contributing

Want to contribute? Check out our [Contributing Guide](https://github.com/zfz584521-collab/obsidian-ai-workb/blob/main/DEVELOPMENT.md#contributing)

## 📮 Contact

- **Issues**: [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/zfz584521-collab/obsidian-ai-workb/issues)
- **Discussions**: [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/zfz584521-collab/obsidian-ai-workb/discussions)
- **Repository**: [GitHub](https://github.com/zfz584521-collab/obsidian-ai-workb)
